title: hieracium tririvicola
intro: Hieracium tririvicola, also known as the hawkweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions. The plant's leaves and roots are used to make herbal preparations, including teas and tinctures, which offer potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving liver function. Traditional herbalists use Hieracium tririvicola in various forms, including infusions, salves, and poultices, to take advantage of its purported medicinal properties.
